{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Zelrek Winter
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zelrek Winter]] is an activation code used by the [[Karoshan]] agent.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Activation code Zelrek Winter,” he said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
